ab: ya amyan syakes ta do vahay?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ya amyan, yamikeh do vahay.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: ya amyan syakes ta do vahay?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: jyabo, na kapa kowbot pa , simaep am nayai.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: ya amyan syakay ta do vahay?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: ya amyan do mivava a kadoa no vahay, angaz am kala sya.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: ya amyan tao do vahay?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: Kaswal? yana mownay jini macita imo, ka papiya?
ch: B:是Kaswal阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Kaswal. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: yapiya! ko kalaen imo paciwalaman.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: anjn nayanan niyama mo?
en: Where is your father?

ab: ya amyan do panonotongan mapasisit so yasay, panci ko siya an?
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他，好?
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: ajin na niyangayan ni Matnaw?
en: Where did Matnaw go?

ab: ya mangay manakep so manok.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: yakay, mo na nimai
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: jiabo akay nyo do vahay, ya amyan do akaon, amyan kanyo do vahay mapa nanala siya, an?
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: maran! ka nanimai!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: ya mownay jini macita, ka nimipakarang.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: masaray macita imo a nimai.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: o pinapo ya am, ya itoro jinyo, pangay nio do pangarerekmehan.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: ka na mownay jinimai, ko ipanci inyo ya koman.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: jimoa rawtan, to kona ngiyop so cinwat, mangay tamo dosdepan miwalam.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝水就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: ayoy nakem mo jyaken, ko na mangay.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: apen mo paya o manok an, yabo ko itoro jimo.
ch: B:這隻雞給你，沒甚麼東西好送.
en: Here’s a chicken for you, just a little something.
